feed.title: AO3 - Hal Jordan (Green Lantern)/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Hal Jordan (Green Lantern)/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Friendship Lantern
entry.summary:
Author: piecesofmoon

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,265Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 5

Summary: Hal gave Bruce a friendship lantern for his birthday. Some say that once the novelty and ardour fade, the bedrock of love is friendship; others claim that romance eventually settles into the quiet kinship of family. But I’ve always been drawn to the insanity of falling in love.

  • Major Character Death

entry.title: don't go in there, you'll become one
entry.summary:
Author: victini_cresoon

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,974Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 46

Summary: Really, Bruce should have expected it to happen eventually. Trapped in an alternate universe, stuck in a body much younger than he was before having his soul dragged somewhere it did not belong, he falls head first into the lives of gods, monsters, magic, and everything inbetween. Quite frankly, he just wants to go home to his family, glowstick of a boyfriend, and most importantly his dog. Too bad souls from his world have started leaking into this one. It would be a disaster if he was the only one who could help. or;bruce gets trapped in the percy jackson universe! shenanigans ensue

entry.title: [Podfic] Maritime Hostile Takeover
entry.summary:
Author: Brovotics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 104Chapters: 4/28Kudos: 14

Summary: [Current Length: 1:25:43] The colony of seals didn’t usually bother Hal whenever he was working, so he paid them no mind unless he was trying to get one to move out his way. How was he supposed to know that finding one of their pelts would trigger a whole-ass situation he was totally unqualified to deal with?

entry.title: Am I making you feel Sick
entry.summary:
Author: fanofthegirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 83,853Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 579

Summary: Hal Jordan was dying long before a mission went wrong and his heart finally gave out. He was dying when he signed the divorce papers. Dying without making it anyone else’s problem. No one Noticed.Not Bruce. Not Clark. Not the Justice League. And Hal was fine with that because twenty months ago he signed away the right to have anyone worry about him. He would have kept it that way, too If he hadn’t burned himself out saving the world. If he hadn’t collapsed hard enough that everyone finally had to look. Now Bruce and Clark are hovering like they never spent nearly two years avoiding him. Acting like this is their burden to carry, like they didn’t already decide, once, that letting him go was easier than staying. Hal doesn’t understand it. There’s no cure. If Oa hasn’t found one, there’s no point in pretending otherwise. He’s made peace with dying. Bruce and Clark haven’t. They refuse to give up on him the way they gave up on the marriage. And that more than the poison in his blood or the ache in his chest is what hurts the most. Because Hal is still in love with them. And loving them while they fight to save him might be the one thing he can’t survive.

entry.title: Gotham is the worst
entry.summary:
Author: Frey_S

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 84,612Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 837

Summary: On top of Hal's list of things he hates are three things: charity galas, Gotham and Batman. So of course he ends up dealing with all of those in one night, even if he doesn't technically know he ends up sleeping with that last one. He's never letting Carol drag him to rich people events ever again. In which Hal dates Bruce Wayne. Tells him he's Green Lantern. Breaks up with him. And then sort of dates Batman without knowing that he is in fact sleeping with Bruce Wayne again.

entry.title: Soulmates, secrets, and kisses
entry.summary:
Author: rie_rotisse

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 111,116Chapters: 18/25Kudos: 1,515

Summary: In this world where almost everyone is born with a soulmark that writes the first sentence your soulmate says to you, many, many have expected Damian's soulmark to be something… fancy, gaudy, and pretentious, even.But then again, nothing is crueler than fate and love, after all.Damian was born with a soulmark on his left chest, right on his heart, written in the colour of gold (of course, it is gold).The soulmark reads.[Hey, that's my chips!]Yes.What an anti-climax. A disappointment, even. [Rating has been changed to avoid spoilers and stuff]

entry.title: Rules of Attraction
entry.summary:
Author: sweetmessyfriend

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,593Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 42

Summary: Hal Jordan has seventy-three dollars in his account, a beaten up Tiguan, and a lifetime of guilt he's still trying to outrun. Bruce Wayne has a house with too many empty rooms and a wedding band he never got to return. When they cross paths at a Gotham hotel bar, Bruce makes Hal an offer: a room, a bed, a place to land. It's supposed to be simple. Two people with history, a temporary arrangement, no reason to complicate things. But old habits die hard and neither of them has ever been good at being honest.

entry.title: live on in your eyes and not your mind
entry.summary:
Author: HC_Carter12

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,278Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 82

Summary: Despite what Clark seemed to think, Bruce was not nervous. Bruce was not only the third richest man in the world, a competent businessman and a father of seven. He was the goddamn Batman. Batman didn’t get nervous. “I’m just saying it would make sense if you were nervous about today,” said Clark, ignoring Bruce’s glare. “It’s not every day you have to interview your dead mom- who it turns out hasn’t been dead in years- because she magically mentored a former friend while he was dead, because now that friend has come back to life as well.” Bruce felt his eye begin to twitch behind the cowl’s lens. “Shut up, Clark.”   Hal Jordan was brought back to life, which would be great if it didn't involve Martha Wayne also being alive and Bruce not knowing a thing about it.

entry.title: In Wayward Lanterns and Interdimensional Couples Therapy
entry.summary:
Author: Kritleft

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,419Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 795

Summary: In a world where Hal and Bruce got over their petty in-fighting and actually took the leap from enemies to lovers, they celebrate the two-year anniversary of their marriage until something goes horribly wrong and Hal is sent to another world where it wasn't the Green Lantern that seduced the bat, but Superman. Between not being in the position anymore to knock sense into his (not)husband, grappling with his own rampant insecurities, and snooping around the life of his alternate self there was a lot on his plate that pissed him off; luckily even here he was still the favourite parent and his kids are still not all that complicated (even if Clark might say otherwise).

entry.summary:
Author: rie_rotisse

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 711Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 52

entry.title: A morning with breakfast, coffee, and jokes
entry.summary:
Author: rie_rotisse

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,156Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 61

Summary: "The table's too big," Hal complains as he stuffs his mouth with that day's breakfast—bacon and poached egg Italian style, or 'Eggs in Purgatory', Hal likes that name much, much more."Do you want to change it for a smaller one?" Bruce nods."We'll see. Have you put together a table from IKEA before?" Hal asks."You have a Master's in Engineering. And I build rocket jets in my free time, Hal. How hard can it be?" Bruce snorts. -----------BatLantern discord Valentine Bingo 2026: "Domestic morning"

entry.title: Why am I doing this again?
entry.summary:
Author: Brewky

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,778Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 51

Summary: Hal was expecting a day spent sleeping through 3 months at most, with him getting called and carrying on duties during his stay in outer space, nonstop. Saying he wasn't tired was a big understatement. Yet of course, flipping Batman had to break into his apartment like he owned it. That man can take Gotham all he wants, but he doesn't have the right to break into the JL homes even for emergencies. Hal wanted to yell at Batman as soon as he saw him on his couch, only to stop and freeze at the sight of a bundle held by the other man. Black and white hair. Is that...?   "When did Jason become a baby…?" Batman just grunted in response, likely annoyed. How is he the one to be annoyed with Hal when he should be the one pissed right now??   Aka Hal having to help Batman deal with baby Jason, unwillingly   (inspired by this one writer who wrote baby Jason and Kyle, my fav 💖💖💖💖💖)

entry.title: 5 times people realize Batman has a favorite person and 1 time Hal finally knows who it is
entry.summary:
Author: rie_rotisse

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,634Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 925

Summary: Batman doesn't have a favourite. He's not the type. He has never had a favourite—even among his own horde of children. Or so he thinks.Because that is a blatant lie. Anyone with eyes would say so. His friends, his family, his enemies, even Alfred the Cat can see it.Or hear it.Because it started with a nickname,"Spooky".

entry.title: I Bet You’re In Love
entry.summary:
Author: BlurredHoney

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,643Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 202

Summary: It’s fluff, man. It’s Dick bonding with Bruce, Bruce not seeing his relationship with Hal as it is, and Dick deciding to take matters into his own hands, with the help of all of their friends, to prove to Bruce the thing he didn’t even remember he was supposed to be looking for.Bruce cranks out 50 squats with Dick sitting on his shoulders, for a bet. Dick looks contemplative. “What’s on your mind, chum?”“I was just thinking…” he sticks out his tongue from the corner of his mouth. “Would you tell me if you were dating someone?”Bruce cocks his head. “‘Course, chum. Why?”“Well, it’s just, I feel like you might not. But you know I’m old enough, right? You can tell me about that stuff, I won’t be like, weirded out, or anything.”“I know that.”
